method: Independent GPT-5.5 xhigh subagent and Kimi judge agreement over repo fixture code and issue text.

samples.rationale: Both judges selected _build_and_store_analysis as the traceback caller and parse_repo as the non-returning parser call. api/views.py::analysis is only the request entry point, and parser helpers are implementation details outside the minimal origin.

Both judges selected get_repo_analysis and _build_and_store_analysis as the issue path. delete_share_token is an unrelated same-file helper, while api/views.py and github_repo/services.py are explicit decoys.
